request_text: fix the dashboard showing 0 WP cards for mission coordination-topology-stabilization-01KTZVQ2: the running dashboard server (PID 7517) uses the rc42 system install which lacks coord worktree priority in gather_feature_paths. The rc43 local install already has the coord worktree priority logic in scanner.py. Kill the old server and restart with .venv/bin/spec-kitty dashboard --open.
